response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched video, identified intro teaser (00:00-03:09), animation (03:09-03:43), and vocal performance (03:43-04:59). 2. On-screen text identified the song as 'Daisuke' by Y&Co. 3. Performed web search for 'Daisuke Y&Co. lyrics'. 4. Located definitive lyrics on PetitLyrics. 5. Constructed JSON with accurate metadata and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a teaser for a new 3D outfit for the VTuber IRyS, followed by a short animation, and culminating in a live 3D performance of the song 'Daisuke'.

scenes.description: Teaser screen for 'Racing Towards Hope', a new 3D outfit reveal for IRyS. No vocal music.
Short animation featuring IRyS in a car. Background instrumental music only.

scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
I’m a country girl, but you’re a super cityboy.
I’m a natural girl, but you’re prince for me.
Everyday wondering how I become your girl.
Everynight, I’m feeling your body in my dreams.
I can’t sleep at all, hello, Morning sun.
My love, my crush, (I) wanna tell you my feeling.
Please tell me now, how do you feel me?
Please show me now.
I wanna dance with you more.
Right now, I want you’re one for you.
Everytime, everywhere, I will surely get your honest love.
Daisuke...
I’m a natural girl, but you’re prince for me.
I’m a country girl, but you’re a super cityboy.
Everyday wondering how I become your girl.

Please tell me now, how do you feel me?
Please show me now.
I wanna dance with you more.
Right now, I want you’re one for you.
Everytime, (everynight,) everywhere, (everywhere,)
I will surely get your honest love.
Daisuke...
